title: pepkio-mendelian-cross-solver v0.1.0 – a Python client for Mendelian cross analysis via the Pepkio life-science calculator suite
description: Version-controlled deposition of **pepkio-mendelian-cross-solver** on Zenodo offers a citable Python client for lab calculators that generate Punnett squares, offspring genotype and phenotype ratios, and stepwise walkthroughs across Mendelian and non-Mendelian inheritance modes in genetics education and research. The archive locks the client release used in each study while routing cross computations to the hosted Pepkio calculator API. Source code and the issue tracker are maintained at https://github.com/pepkio/pepkio-mendelian-cross-solver. The primary interactive platform for the same calculations is the [Pepkio Mendelian Cross Solver](https://www.pepkio.com/tools/mendelian-cross-solver), part of a Pepkio suite of more than thirty web tools covering solution prep, PCR, cell culture, assays, pharmacology, education, and sequence utilities. The Python client supports batch cross analysis and integration with Jupyter, Nextflow, and Snakemake without embedding calculator logic locally. Released under the MIT License; Pepkio (https://www.pepkio.com/) develops laboratory calculators and analysis services for life science research.
notes:
**Suggested citation.** When referencing the archived client in a publication, cite the Zenodo DOI together with the GitHub repository (https://github.com/pepkio/pepkio-mendelian-cross-solver) and record the client version (v0.1.0) in methods or supplementary materials.

**Programmatic access.** This client is the recommended interface for scripted calls to the Pepkio Mendelian Cross Solver API; the interactive web application remains available for manual cross analysis. Calculator logic resides on Pepkio servers; this package transmits parameters and returns structured results only.
